strengths: Maintained good traction throughout the cutting process
Successfully completed the full circle cut within reasonable time
Demonstrated consistent instrument coordination during curved sections
weaknesses: Line deviations occurred in curved sections where cut strayed outside target boundary
Inconsistent precision when following the marked circle path

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, pausing between each quarter to verify alignment with the marked line.

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle, focusing on maintaining optimal cutting geometry throughout curves.
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent precision when following marked path

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your consistent completion ability into more precise path following. Work on maintaining cutting accuracy through curved sections while preserving your current speed.
